prompt: In one sentence, what is an AI agent?
output_preview: An AI agent is a computer program that can perform tasks or make decisions based on input from users or other AI agents.
notes: GGUF CPU low-bit quantization sweep (llama-cpp-python) on Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct-GGUF. Separate small-model sweep — NOT AirLLM, NOT the Transformers Qwen2-0.5B runs, NOT a large-model baseline.
output_text: An AI agent is a computer program that can perform tasks or make decisions based on input from users or other AI agents.
